feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: IW38 ,Display number of entries (Counter) in PM list edit reports not showing to add in layout.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

User requested to see the number of entries for IW38 PM list edit report but for this the Counter is not showing in the layout to choose.

We required the functionality described in KBA  2181264 

Best Regards,

Ganesh

entry.title: Custom entity oMDO ID is not "in scope" in 2405 Asset Manager Component assignment
entry.content:
SAP Service and Asset Manager 
I have created a custom OMDO ID and custom entityset. At entityset level, I have activated it

But when I try to activate this OMDO ID in component assignment under OMDO assignment, its scope is deactivated so I am not able to activate it:

How can I activate it?

entry.title: COFC Period Posting issue for Work Order
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Under what circumstances a record will be confirmed through CAT9 and appear in COFC even when the period is locked for posting.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: WCM Control Key
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I want to run a cycle of permit to work ( WCM ) on S4 Hana system . I am assigning WCM control key in work order operation but WAP is not getting activated . All WCM related business function is activated . Can anyone please shed some light what configuration is missing ? Is there any other method available to activate WCM ?

Thanking you very much

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: SAP EAM - Epic, Feature Example
entry.content: Can someone please give me an example of epic, feature, and user story from SAP context?  Like for example, if I have EAM, I am assuming "Preventative Maintenance", "Corrective Maintenace", "Management of Change" is considered as epic....  Please advise...  If there are other tracks, I can relate to, then please give me an example of that...

entry.title: Issue with : Perform Maintenance Jobs without assignment functionality
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

While exploring one of client requirement: As ' Supervisor can confirm the work without assigning WO/Operations to his name',

I can came across below node and did configuration accordingly. ( shown in fig 2)

 

 

Expectation from system behaviour is : System to allow [Perform Maintenance Jobs app] supervisor to confirm the Job/operations without assigning to his name or allow to confirm the Job even it is assigned to other technician(s)

Observation is, System is not behaving as mentioned above ? Am I missing something here ? 

Any comments or suggestion or alternative solution to client requirement ?

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 in Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

9 Phase Model Vs Traditional Maintenance methods [ 4HH, 4HI Vs BH1, BH2 & BJ2]

I found, for SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Asset management scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 scope items are excluded from default activation (that means they are Deprecated) Whereas in SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition all scope items are available (for activation).

Question here - if client is going with Private cloud edition, can they still use processes around scope items BH1, BH2 & BJ2 as they will remain activated and not deprecated in near future? (May be for next 3-4 years’ time span)

As I understand scope items BH1,BH2,BJ2 are deprecated from 2302 release in public cloud and replaced with 4HH and 4HI, But still in case client requirements to not to go ahead with 9 Phase model in private cloud edition, Is it still valid proposition to suggest these scope items?

I couldn’t find clear answer on this in SAP road map explorer or anywhere else hence reaching out to wider group of experts here.

Any comments or suggestions are highly appreciated in terms of guiding client(s) into right direction during process adaptation, Considering SAP future strategy around Scope Items BH1, BH2 & BJ2.

BR,

Riyaj

entry.title: Data conversion Plant Maintenance
entry.content:
Is there any recommended conversion strategy to move rom standard SAP PM to new S/4 Phase model. The main focus my question is on the transactional data conversion (Notification, Maintenance Orders). Not talking about creating new orders , but how to transfer orders that are released and being processed , already have Purchase Requisitions and Purchase orders assigned , Materias reserved and partially delivered, services requested and partially confirmed aso. 

Thanks for your feedback in advance.

entry.title: Purchase requestion release strategy got reset when business executed iw38 -Material availabilit che
entry.content:
Hi 

Business executed material availability check through iw38 transaction, due to this execution BANF (Purchase requestion) release strategy got reset, In CDHDR table observed object BANF release field changes observed. For both Service and Material PR. 

Please suggest which parameter influenced release strategy reset.

entry.title: Significance of WCM Objects
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

Can any one please explain the significance of below WCM objects ? What are the usages of these objects?

1. Valuation 

2. Work Approval 

3. Work Clearance Application 

4. Work Clearance Document 

5. Additional Application 

Thanking you very much .

Best Regards

Mohammed

entry.title: pm maintenance order document flow
entry.content:
In the PM (Plant Maintenance) module of SAP S/4HANA 2022, I've encountered an issue where, after performing a technical completion (TECO) on a maintenance order, the associated purchase requisition (PR) no longer appears in the document flow. In previous versions, the purchase requisition would still be visible in the document flow even after the maintenance order was technically completed.

  • Is this change in the document flow display after TECO a standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA 2022?
  • Is there any configuration setting that controls the visibility of purchase requisitions in the document flow after a maintenance order is technically completed?
  • How can I ensure that the associated purchase requisition remains visible in the document flow after TECO?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance from the community experts. Thank you very much!

entry.title: why I count see my pr in the document flow after technical completion
entry.content:
In the PM (Plant Maintenance) module of SAP S/4HANA 2022, I've encountered an issue where, after performing a technical completion (TECO) on a maintenance order, the associated purchase requisition (PR) no longer appears in the document flow. Before technical completion, I can see the PR in the document flow, but after technical completion, it disappears. In previous versions, the purchase requisition would still be visible in the document flow even after the maintenance order was technically completed.

  • Is this change in the document flow display after TECO a standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA 2022?
  • Is there any configuration setting that controls the visibility of purchase requisitions in the document flow after a maintenance order is technically completed?
  • How can I ensure that the associated purchase requisition remains visible in the document flow after TECO?

I would appreciate any insights or guidance from the community experts. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Restrict User from Cancel TECO in PM Maintenance Orders
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanna ask about Restrict Several User from Cancel TECO in Maintenance Orders in IW32 after the Maintenance Orders already TECO.

I Already remove BUTA Authorization but still the user can do Cancel TECO.

Is there any Suggestion for restrict that ?

entry.title: Rental of equipments
entry.content:
Hi All,
Maintenance plants A,B&C are there. Where all the equipment(assets) will be maintained in the maintenance plant A. When equipment(vehicles) are required by plant B& plant C they will raise a request , then maintenance plant A will give the equipment to B&C and will charge on a monthly basis.
1.How to map this scenario,it is the construction industry. PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM)

entry.title: unable to release a work order-SAP PM
entry.content:
I am unable to release a PM work order.

Getting this message- Current status does not allow release

Order has a CSER status but I have also tried to release orders without CSER status and I get the same error message.

Message No. /DOW/PP_PM_MSG009

Please help sort this issue.

Thank you. PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) SAP EAM Work Order SAP ERP

entry.title: Order address is not getting updated in PR for service operation
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

We have done config for service operation by having order as priority 1 but the order address is not getting updated in PR. Can you please help us on this. 

Regards, 

Preethi

entry.title: Is there another solution to disallow processing data against organizational functional location
entry.content:
Hello,

I am seeking alternative solutions to the commonly discussed approach of using status management to prevent the creation of processing data (e.g., work orders or notifications) at specific functional locations. Our requirement is to disallow the creation of work orders and notifications at the top two nodes within the FLOC hierarchy.

For context, we recently completed a brownfield implementation and are now running on S/4HANA on-premise. During the implementation phase, I came across official SAP documentation that suggested a different method to address our requirement, but unfortunately, I didn’t save the reference and can no longer locate it.

Could anyone help identify whether this alternative approach is available through a business function or Business Add-In (BAdI)? If possible, I would greatly appreciate a reference to the relevant SAP documentation.

I’m currently in a bit of a bind: SAP has responded to my query with several SAP Notes distinguishing between support and consulting services, while my consultant believes that status management is the only available solution and lacks further knowledge of any alternatives.

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: Plant Abroad functionality in NA
entry.content:
We have implement Plant abroad functionality for EU which is offered by SAP.
We want to implement same for US Company Code. Could you please guide us to achieve the same.

entry.title: add zfields to IW68/IW69 Notifications Itens
entry.content:
Hi SCN,

 

Can we enhance notifications list : IW68/IW69? Itens notification list.

we've used BADI_EAM_SINGLELEVEL_LIST to enhance IW28/IW29 but for IW38/IW39 didn't found any BADI.

Thanks.

Regards,

Maria João Rocha

entry.title: SAP OCI catalog - support SSO integartion
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have received a request from a vendor to to set up an OCI Catalog and they would like SSO integration.

We would like to check if if SAP OCI catalog can support SSO integration if vendor is capable of supporting SSO (SAML).

Any document to guide us will be really helpful.

Looking forward to your assistance.
